concept.title: Generating a site using GDocs
concept.shortdesc: Learn how to use the Library tool from the New York Times to host documentation using Google Docs.

conbody.p: If your organization uses GDocs, you can use the open source New York Times documentation site called Library.

Library lets you:
Collate all GDocs into one single portal.
Search across all your GDocs.
Quickly add/publish new GDocs in Library.
To implement Library, follow the installation instructions in GitHub.
